label: 标准化输出
description: 将多个 [网格/网格列表, 名称清单/名称清单列表] 包预处理对齐后统一重编号：①过滤清单中网格不含的幽灵条目；②补全网格有值但清单缺失的条目；③按列表顺序一一对应（gridList[i] ↔ nameListList[i]）；④所有槽位合并后从1起全局重编号。
description-en: Pre-processes and aligns each [grid/gridList, nameList/nameListList] bundle, then re-numbers all values globally from 1: ① removes ghost entries not present in the grid; ② fills missing entries for values in the grid; ③ matches gridList[i] to nameListList[i] by index; ④ merges all slots and assigns globally unique IDs starting from 1.
icon: 多个叠加的网格层向下合并为一个网格，每层用不同颜色标注，底部输出整齐排列的编号标签，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: description
inputs.label: 说明信息
inputs.description: 任意说明文字，原封不动传至同名输出端口
inputs.description-en: Arbitrary description text; passed through unchanged to the output port.

inputs.name: item_0
inputs.label: 层0
inputs.description: [网格或网格列表, 名称清单] 两元素列表；网格槽位为网格列表时自动拆层
inputs.description-en: Two-element list [grid or gridList, nameList]; if grid slot is a grid list, each sub-grid is processed independently.

inputs.name: item_1
inputs.label: 层1
inputs.description: [网格或网格列表, 名称清单] 两元素列表；连接后自动追加新槽位
inputs.description-en: Two-element list [grid or gridList, nameList]; connecting it appends a new slot.

outputs.name: description
outputs.label: 说明信息
outputs.description: 与输入端口「说明信息」相同的字符串，原封不动透传
outputs.description-en: Same string as the input 'description' port, passed through unchanged.

outputs.name: outputGrids
outputs.label: 输出网格列表
outputs.description: 重编号后的网格列表，顺序与输入一致，各层独立不合并；同一列表内所有网格的值均全局唯一
outputs.description-en: List of remapped grids in input order; each layer remains separate. All values across the list are globally unique.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 统一名称清单，经预处理对齐后全局重编号，{id, name, type?} 条目 ID 与所有输出网格中的值一一对应
outputs.description-en: Unified name list after pre-processing alignment and global re-numbering; {id, name, type?} entry IDs match the values across all output grids.

outputs.name: errorMessage
outputs.label: 错误信息
outputs.description: 检测两类问题：①名称重复（同名条目出现多次）；②缺少 type 字段（条目未携带 tile/asset 等类型标记）。有问题时输出提示文字，无问题时输出空字符串
outputs.description-en: Detects two issues: ① duplicate names; ② missing type field (entry has no tile/asset type marker). Outputs an error message if issues exist, empty string otherwise.
